# Better Auth — OpenAPI & sign up / sign in / sign out

Better Auth’s default base path is **`/api/auth`**.  
Append every path below to `BETTER_AUTH_URL` (for example in dev: `http://127.0.0.1:8787`).

## OpenAPI (generated by Better Auth)

With the `openAPI()` plugin enabled in `src/lib/auth.ts`:

| Purpose | URL |
|---------|-----|
| **Interactive API docs (Scalar)** | `GET /api/auth/reference` |
| **OpenAPI JSON document** | `GET /api/auth/open-api/generate-schema` |

- Import the JSON into Postman, Insomnia, or a codegen client.
- Scalar lets you try **cookie** or **Bearer** authentication (see security schemes in the schema).

**Note:** The app’s Chanfana OpenAPI (docs at `/`) only lists routes registered with `openapi.*`. **All auth routes** live in the Better Auth spec at the two URLs above.

---

## Sign up

| | |
|---|---|
| **Method & path** | `POST /api/auth/sign-up/email` |
| **Content-Type** | `application/json` |
| **Body** | `{ "name": string, "email": string, "password": string }` |
| **Optional** | `image`, `callbackURL`, `rememberMe` |

**Example `curl`:**

```bash
curl -sS -X POST "${BASE}/api/auth/sign-up/email" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: ${BASE}" \
  -d '{"name":"Jane Doe","email":"jane@example.com","password":"password12"}'
```

- `password` must be at least **8 characters** (Better Auth default).
- Browsers / WebViews: send an **`Origin`** header that matches an entry in `trustedOrigins` (often the same as `BETTER_AUTH_URL`).
- Native apps (e.g. OkHttp) often **omit** `Origin` — calls usually still work; if you get 403, try sending `Origin` or review CORS settings on the server.

---

## Sign in

| | |
|---|---|
| **Method & path** | `POST /api/auth/sign-in/email` |
| **Content-Type** | `application/json` |
| **Body** | `{ "email": string, "password": string }` |
| **Optional** | `callbackURL`, `rememberMe` |

**Example `curl`:**

```bash
curl -sS -X POST "${BASE}/api/auth/sign-in/email" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: ${BASE}" \
  -d '{"email":"jane@example.com","password":"password12"}'
```

**JSON response:** typically includes `user`, `token` (session token), and `redirect`.

- **Web + cookies:** the browser stores the session cookie (use `credentials: 'include'` on cross-origin requests).
- **Mobile / APIs:** store `token` and send **`Authorization: Bearer <token>`** on later requests (Bearer plugin).

Responses may include a **`Set-Auth-Token`** header — Bearer clients can read it when CORS exposes it (`exposeHeaders` is configured for `/api/auth/*`).

---

## Sign out

### Option 1 — `POST /api/auth/sign-out` (cookie-based sessions)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Method & path** | `POST /api/auth/sign-out` |
| **Headers** | Session cookie set by Better Auth (send it if your client keeps cookies). |

```bash
curl -sS -X POST "${BASE}/api/auth/sign-out" \
  -H "Origin: ${BASE}" \
  -H "Cookie: <session-cookie>"
```

### Option 2 — Bearer-only mobile clients: revoke a specific session

`POST /sign-out` mainly clears the session via the **cookie**. If the app only keeps a **token** in memory/storage, use:

| | |
|---|---|
| **Method & path** | `POST /api/auth/revoke-session` |
| **Headers** | `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (current session) |
| **Body** | `{ "token": "<same session token to revoke>" }` |

You must be authenticated (session middleware accepts Bearer). See the full contract in the OpenAPI JSON at `/api/auth/open-api/generate-schema`.

---

## Quick smoke test

1. Open `{BETTER_AUTH_URL}/api/auth/reference` in a browser.
2. Run **Sign up** → **Sign in** → **Get session** (`GET /api/auth/get-session` with cookie or Bearer).
3. Export the JSON schema to share with your team or generate a client.

Official docs: [Better Auth — Hono](https://better-auth.com/docs/integrations/hono), [Drizzle adapter](https://better-auth.com/docs/adapters/drizzle), [Bearer plugin](https://better-auth.com/docs/plugins/bearer).
